MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCE:
Joanna C. Maino, Esq. of BOORNAZIAN, JENSEN & GARTHE 510/834-4350 for defendant WALGREEN CO. moving for summary adjudiction of the 2nd & 3rd Causes of Action
Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows:
Motion for summary adjudication by WALGREENS:
As to intentional infliction of emotional distress -- granted.
As to negligent infliction of emotional distress -- granted --no evidence that any plaintiffs had contemporaneous awareness of injury producing event.
(JJM) Patrick Heard, CSR 11055
